title: Meteor Fireball Mystery Deepens as Meteor Sightings Surge and UFO Speculation Grows
description: Meteor fireball sightings surge across the UK, fuelling UFO speculation and viral debate as experts explain the bright green sky phenomenon

title: Open UFO Files, Burchett Urges Trump
description: Rep. Tim Burchett says the real UFO mystery is why the government keeps the files locked up. Appearing on Fox News over the weekend, the Republican urged President Trump to follow through on his pledge to declassify records on aliens and unidentified anomalous phenomena. Burchett said he's been briefed by...

title: Kacey Musgraves Claims UFO Encounter During Flight to Nashville
description: Country singer Kacey Musgraves shared a story about witnessing a UFO while flying to Nashville. She posted a video of the alleged encounter on her Instagram, describing the objects as "orbs" that followed her plane.

title: ‘America Needs To Know’: GOP Lawmaker Urges Trump To Release ‘Wild’ UFO Files
‘America Needs To Know’: GOP Lawmaker Urges Trump To Release ‘Wild’ UFO Files
description: Rep. Tim Burchett urged Trump to "peel back the layers of that onion."
